title: CLI Todo App
description: Build a command-line todo list manager. Practice structs, enums, vectors, and file I/O.

steps.title: Define the Todo struct
steps.instructions: Create a Todo struct with fields: id (u32), title (String), and completed (bool). Implement Display for it.

steps.title: Create a TodoList manager
steps.instructions: Create a TodoList struct that holds a Vec<Todo>. Add methods: add(title), complete(id), remove(id), and list() -> &[Todo].

steps.title: Parse user commands
steps.instructions: Create a Command enum with variants: Add(String), Complete(u32), List, Remove(u32), Quit. Write a parse function that converts a string input into a Command.

steps.title: Wire it all together
steps.instructions: Create a main() function that reads user input in a loop, parses commands, and executes them on a TodoList. Print the todo list after each command.
